# DSE Group

> DSE Group LLC is an AI services company based in Encinitas, California, USA (San Diego County).
> We build digital brains and AI Operating Systems for influential individuals
> (founders, creators, public figures) and companies, private AI systems that
> hold their knowledge, connect their tools, and operate on their behalf.

## Services
- Digital Brains & AI Operating Systems: https://dsegroup.ai/ai-operating-system.html, private AI trained on a client's knowledge and workflows, integrated with their tools.
- Voice AI & Phone Agents: https://dsegroup.ai/voice-ai.html, AI agents that answer and make phone calls, qualify leads, book appointments, and update CRMs 24/7.
- Conversational AI Solutions: https://dsegroup.ai/conversational-ai.html, customer assistants, sales chat, and fan companion experiences with persistent memory and brand voice.

## Company
- Location: Encinitas, California, United States (San Diego County, serving clients nationwide)
- Contact: https://dsegroup.ai/contact.html · hello@dsegroupae.com
- Insights (daily blog on AI Operating Systems and AI integration for businesses): https://dsegroup.ai/blog/
